title: GitHub issue triager crashes on private repos with no token
body: agent.py's fetch_github_issue() calls r.raise_for_status() but when GITHUB_TOKEN is unset and the repo is private, the GitHub API returns 404 instead of 401, and the resulting HTTPError message doesn't explain that a token is needed. Could we detect 404/401 and print a clearer hint to set GITHUB_TOKEN?

title: triage_issue() JSON parsing breaks when model wraps response in prose
body: parse_json_response() strips ```json fences and regex-searches for the first {...} block, but gpt-4o-mini sometimes prepends a sentence like 'Here is the analysis:' before the fence is even opened, and re.search with DOTALL then grabs an unrelated brace from later in the text. Could use a more robust JSON extraction or ask for strict JSON mode.

title: calculate_project_metrics tool allows tasks_completed > tasks_total
body: In crewai_mcp_course/lesson_03/mcp_server.py the calculate_project_metrics MCP tool computes percentage = tasks_completed / tasks_total * 100 without validating that tasks_completed <= tasks_total, so a CrewAI agent can report something like 140% complete with status 'On Track'. Should clamp or validate inputs.

title: Web gallery slugify() collides for entries that only differ by punctuation
body: content.js's slugify() strips all non a-z0-9 characters and collapses dashes, so two agent titles like 'PDF Q&A Agent' and 'PDF QA Agent' both produce the slug 'pdf-qa-agent', causing duplicate anchor links on the site. We should append an index suffix when a collision is detected.

title: Add a new agent example for changelog generation from git log
body: The agents/ directory has 20 numbered examples (01-web-research-agent through 20-multi-agent-debate) covering research, code review, SQL, email, etc., but nothing that turns `git log` output into a formatted changelog. Would like to contribute agents/21-changelog-agent following the same agent.py structure as the others.
